summary: Iteration 42 - Tested ZET Mindshare editor multipage editing features. Found critical bug where Chart panel and Image Upload modal open unexpectedly when using addpage tool. Basic features (login, document creation, text editing, page addition) work but tool triggering has side effects.

ui_bugs.issue: Chart panel and Image Upload modal open unexpectedly when clicking addpage tool. This appears to be a tool ID mapping or event propagation issue.
Cross-page text editing may not work seamlessly - clicking text on different page doesn't always switch and enable editing. Related to pendingEditRef logic in CanvasArea.js

features_tested.Create new document from dashboard: PASS - Modal opens, document created, navigates to editor
features_tested.Add second page using addpage tool: PARTIAL - Page added but Chart panel opens unexpectedly
features_tested.Type text on Page 1: PASS - Text element created and editable
features_tested.Type text on Page 2: PASS - Text element created on second page
features_tested.Click on Page 1 to edit (cross-page edit: INCONCLUSIVE - Page switches but editing may not activate
features_tested.PDF Export button visible: PASS - PDF Aktar button present in header
features_tested.Multi-page vertical scroll layout: PASS - All pages visible in vertical scroll

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix tool selection side effects - clicking addpage tool should ONLY add page, not open Chart/Image panels
Debug why multiple modals/panels open on single tool click - check for event propagation issues or incorrect tool index mapping
Test export all pages functionality after fixing the Chart panel bug
Verify cross-page editing works: clicking text on different page should switch page AND open text editing
critical_code_review_comments: The handleToolSelect function in Editor.js looks correct - addpage maps to addPage() only
Possible issue: Tool grid click may be propagating to multiple buttons due to grid layout
The TOOLS array in editorConstants.js has correct IDs but the grid rendering order might cause adjacent tool clicks
Consider adding stopPropagation to tool button clicks in Toolbox.js

success_rate.frontend: 65% - Core features work but unexpected panel openings are blocking proper testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 42 found that addpage tool works (page count increases from 1 to 2) but opens Chart panel and Image modal unexpectedly. This needs to be fixed before proper multipage editing and export testing can be completed. The page indicator in header correctly shows page count (e.g., 2/2). PDF Aktar button is visible. Cross-page editing needs verification after the panel bug is fixed.

unexpected_panel_opening.description: When clicking the addpage tool, both Chart panel and Image Upload modal open unexpectedly, in addition to the page being added
possible_causes: Tool button clicks in the 3-column grid may be triggering adjacent tools due to small hit areas
Event propagation causing multiple tool handlers to fire
Race condition in state updates causing multiple panels to open
suggested_investigation: Add console.log to handleToolSelect to see which toolId is being passed
Check if tool grid has proper click boundaries
Verify no duplicate onClick handlers exist
Test if clicking with force=True in Playwright has different behavior than normal clicks
